title: Interact with 'TOP LEADERS' List
test_steps: Step 1: Tap on the 'TOP LEADERS' card., Step 2: Verify that John Doe's profile appears with 1500 XP.
expected_result: John Doe should be listed under 'TOP LEADERS' with correct XP and rank., Profile details including name, XP, and rank should match the test data.

title: Engage with 'You Are Next' Section
test_steps: Step 1: Scroll down to the '... YOU ARE NEXT' section., Step 2: Tap on the entry for Jane Smith.
expected_result: Jane Smith's information should be displayed correctly in the '... YOU ARE NEXT' section., Scroll behavior should allow easy access to the '... YOU ARE NEXT' section.

title: Test CTA Button Functionality
test_steps: Step 1: Locate the CTA button within the '... YOU ARE NEXT' section., Step 2: Tap the CTA button.
expected_result: The system should navigate to the appropriate page after tapping the CTA button., Navigation flow post-CTA tap should be consistent with expected outcomes.

title: Verify Contrast Ratio Compliance
test_steps: Step 1: Check the contrast ratio between the text and its background in both the 'TOP LEADERS' and '... YOU ARE NEXT' sections., Step 2: Confirm compliance with WCAG AA standards (≥4.5:1)
expected_result: Contrast ratios should meet or exceed the WCAG AA standard., Text visibility issues due to poor contrast should be absent.

title: Check Text Size in '... YOU ARE NEXT' Section
test_steps: Step 1: Measure the font size used for the user names and XP in the '... YOU ARE NEXT' section., Step 2: Ensure the font size is at least 12sp to meet accessibility guidelines.
expected_result: Font size for all text in the '... YOU ARE NEXT' section should be at least 12sp., Any deviation from the required font size should trigger an alert during testing.
